# KDF Starter Astro

> A clean, minimal, framework-agnostic starting point for Konde Design Framework (KDF) built with Astro.

KDF Starter Astro allows AI agents and human developers to build unified, lightweight, and blazing fast websites using JSON design tokens mapped via the KDF engine.

## Core Resources
- [Live Starter Site](https://starter.konde.io/)
- [Standalone Repository](https://github.com/KondeIO/kdf-starter-astro)
- [Monorepo Repository](https://github.com/KondeIO/konde-io)

## Developer Documentation
- [KDF Core Documentation](https://github.com/KondeIO/kdf/blob/main/docs/doc.md)
- [Interactive KDF Playground](https://playground.konde.io/)

## Brand & Framework Links
- [Konde Studio](https://konde.io/)
- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/KondeIO)
